note: This is a manual self-audit performed by Claude against the criteria previously reported by the wwt-plugin-marketplace checklist tool (a separate assistant/session, not available to this session). It is not a re-run of that automated tool, and should not be presented as one.

no secret/credential-shaped strings in repo content

observations: Minor, non-blocking: the skill folder is skills/partner-pipeline-report/ without the wwt- prefix the plugin name itself carries. Not flagged as an error by any known rule, but worth a reviewer's eye.
